raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atgreeſhs Sauls no
fawas Dshſchanas Dahwidam
pakkaſ/ un gahje prett teem Wi-
liſtereeim/ tapehz tohp fchi Wee-
ta noſaukta Sela Maklekot.
(Schtſchanas-Akmins.)
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids gahje no teje-
nes augſcham/ un palikke eeſch
teem Stiprumeeim Engedi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXIV. Nodalla.
Sauls waja Dahwidu Engedôs: 1. Bet
nahk nonejaufchi Dahwidam Rohkâ: 4.
Bet tas winnu faudse un nogreesch weenu
Stuhri no Saula Swahrkeem: 5. Un ee,
runna winnam/ kamehr Sauls atſiſht/ ka
winſch ar Netaiſnibu Dahwidu wajaiis: 9/17.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad nu Sauls no teem
Wiſiſtereeim bij atgree-
ſees/ tappe winnam
teikts un fazzihts: Redſi/ Dah-
wids irr eekſch tahs Tukſneſes
Engedi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nehme Sauls trihs-
tuhſtoschus labbus Wihrus no
wiſſa Iſraëta/ un gahje Dahwi-
du mekleht ar winna Wihrceim/
us to Meschu-Kaso Akminza-
Kalneeim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winſch nahze pee teem
Anju-Laidareem Zelt-Mallâ/
tur bija weena Alla/ nn Sauls
gahje eekſch tahs fawas Kahjas
ſegt/ bet Dahwids un winna
Wihri tehdeja pakkat eekſch tahs
Allas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazziija Dahwida Wi-
ri us to: Rangi/ ſcht irr ta Dee-
na/ no ka tas KUNGS us teu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Fenatdneeku tawá Rohkâ/ un ter
buhs winnam darriht/ ka tew laſ-
bi patihk. Un Dahwids zehlehs
un nogreese kiſſinam weenâ
Stuhri no Saula Swahrkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet pehz lehze Dahwidam t
Sirđs pahr to/ ka winſch t
Stuhri no Saula Swahrkeem
bij nogreesis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winſch fazziija us fa
weem Wihrceem: Laid tas KUNG
inan no ta paſarga/ ka es fch
Leetu buhtu darrijs manna
Kungam/ ta KUNGA Sivaid-
tam/ fawu Rohku pee winna
lieſdams: Jo winſch irr ta KUN-
GA Swaidihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids apfauze fa
wus Wihrus ar Wahrdeem/ u
ne dewe winneem Waltu pre-
Saulu zeltees/ un Sauls zet-
lehs no tahs Allas/ un gah-
pa Zelfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz zehlehs arrt Dah-
wids/ un iſgahje no tahs Allas
un fauze Saulam pakkaſ/ un fa-
zija: Mans Kungs Rehniſsc-
Tad ſkattijahs Sauls atpakka-
Un Dahwids lohztijahs ar to Wa-
gu pee Semmes/ un peeliuſe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids fazziija u
Saulu: Kapehz klaufi tu Zilwe-
Wahrdeem/ kas fakka: Redſi
Dahwids mekle tawu Nelaini.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Raugi/ fchodeen reds t
was Azzis/ ka tas KUNGS
tvi fchodeen eekſch tahs Alla
manná Rohkâ dewis. Un gan-
ktua fazzihts/ ka man tew b
nokaut
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
